narrative_purpose: Execute the guardian-and-tiger charge, resolve or interrupt the collision, and carry the damaged guardian into loss of fantasy consciousness.

beats.summary: The guardian mounts the tiger as the frontier fails.
The scout attempts a final warning.
Guardian and tiger commit to the charge.
The complete candidate shows the strike disabling the threat.
The guardian falls damaged and consciousness cuts to black.

unresolved: some battle branches cut before collision

canonical_facts: The guardian and tiger commit to a charge or battle action.
The guardian is damaged and the fantasy layer yields to a blackout or reality transition.

tolerances.implementation: Professional equivalents are accepted when semantic beats and handoffs remain measurable.
unresolved_cases: Heroic breach versus sacrificial last stand.
Rendered image, video, and audio lineage.

terminal_artifact: Approved battle outcome and blackout transition
